task: In Simple Calendar Pro, delete all the calendar events on 2023-10-20

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the phone's home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and another app icon. The target app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not visible on this screen.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app → | Step 2: Navigate to the date 2023-10-20 | Step 3: Select and delete all events on that date

[Decision]
Since the target app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not visible on the current home screen page, I need to open it. I will use the system's open app function to launch "Simple Calendar Pro" directly to proceed with the task of deleting events.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a daily agenda view. The events listed are for dates starting from Wednesday the 18th down to Monday the 23rd. On Friday the 20th, there are two events: "Review session for Budget Planning" (00:00 - 00:15) and "Catch up on Project X" (10:00 - 10:45). Another event "Meeting with Dr. Smith" is also scheduled for Friday the 20th (15:00 - 15:30).

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the date 2023-10-20 ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events on that date →

[Decision]
The current view already shows the events for October 20th. To delete them, I need to open each event individually first. I will start by tapping on the first event for this date, "Review session for Budget Planning", to access its details and find the delete option.

[Memory]
Target date: 2023-10-20. Events found for this date: "Review session for Budget Planning", "Catch up on Project X", and "Meeting with Dr. Smith". Currently targeting the first event.

[Observation]
The screen displays the "Edit Event" page for the event titled "Review session for Budget Planning". The event details show it is scheduled for October 20 (Fri) from 00:00 to 00:15. At the top right of the screen, there are several icons: a checkmark (save), a trash bin (delete), a copy icon, and a three-dot menu icon.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the date 2023-10-20 ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events on that date →

I am now on the details page for the first event on October 20th. According to the plan to delete all events on this date, I need to delete this current event first. The trash bin icon in the top right corner is the standard delete button. I will tap it to remove "Review session for Budget Planning".

[Memory]
Target date: 2023-10-20. Events to delete: "Review session for Budget Planning" (currently deleting), "Catch up on Project X", and "Meeting with Dr. Smith".

[Observation]
The screen displays a confirmation dialog box over the "Edit Event" page. The dialog asks, "Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion?" with two options: "No" and "Yes". The background shows the event details for "Review session for Budget Planning".

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the date 2023-10-20 ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events on that date →

I have initiated the deletion of the first event, and the system requires confirmation. To proceed with deleting "Review session for Budget Planning" as per the current step in the plan, I need to confirm the action. I will tap "Yes" on the dialog box to finalize the deletion of this event.

[Memory]
Target date: 2023-10-20. Events remaining to delete: "Catch up on Project X", and "Meeting with Dr. Smith". "Review session for Budget Planning" is currently being deleted.

Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the date 2023-10-20 ✓ | Step 3: Select and delete all events on that date →
